caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is centered against a solid dark background, appearing to be delivering a presentation or lecture. She wears a light green tunic featuring floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. In the bottom left and bottom center of the scene, a small circular logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". Across the sequence, the woman is speaking and gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. In the beginning, her hands are positioned low and mostly out of view. As the sequence progresses, she raises her right hand, bringing it up toward her chest in a gesturing motion while continuing to speak. The setting remains static throughout, with the focus remaining entirely on her upper body and facial expressions.
